name: jetson-edgellm-v090-qwen3ttsbase
description: v0.9.0 edgellm STREAMING ASR (Qwen3-ASR int4 thinker) + Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-BASE TTS via jetson.trt_edge_llm driving the v0.9.0 streaming worker. DERIVED from jetson-edgellm-v080-qwen3ttsbase (kept as-is for rollback); engines/workers/plugin rebuilt from fork pin integration/v090-sparktts@e8c59c1 (seeed submodule pin repin/v090-overlay@95e97e9). v0.9.0 DELTAS vs v080: (1) EDGELLM_PLUGIN_PATH is REQUIRED and must be ABSOLUTE — the 0.9.0 runtime resolves libNvInfer_edgellm_plugin.so relative to the process CWD otherwise; ONE plugin (built from the same pin as the workers) serves ASR + TTS Base + CustomVoice. (2) EDGE_LLM_ASR_MEL_SETTINGS/_FILTERS are RETIRED — the 0.9.0 audio runner ingests wav directly (EDGELLM_REQUEST_AUDIO_WAV=1 is the new default), so this profile intentionally carries neither key. (3) code2wav is the LEAN NON-STATEFUL build (EDGE_LLM_TTS_STATEFUL_CODE2WAV=0; the worker streams natively via streamingChunkFrames/onChunkReady — no stateful-code2wav surgery). (4) NEW tts_base_spk_encoder engine (EDGE_LLM_TTS_SPK_ENCODER_DIR) enables the voice-clone path; the fixed ref embedding file stays the default speaker source. Like the v080 profiles, the ASR engine dirs are NOT set here — they are baked in the v090 prefix image (/opt/edgellm-v090 layout: bin/ workers + libNvInfer_edgellm_plugin.so + engines/{asr_thinker_full_int4 md5 59e221b5, asr_audio_encoder 9446e727}) and MUST NOT be overridden by the profile. TTS engine provenance (orin-nx ~/project/v090-engines/, md5 first-8): tts_base_talker 82a2d196, tts_base_code_predictor 0184081f, tts_base_code2wav_lean 2890f45e, tts_base_spk_encoder 016a9ebe. Base image tag TBD at P5 (see deploy/docker/Dockerfile.jetson.edgellm-v090-overlay).
